mnemonics: FLAWED AI: Fairness, Legitimacy, Accountability, Well-being, Effectiveness, Democracy, Distribution (of Benefits)
keyPoints: Fairness: Avoiding bias and ensuring equitable treatment.
Legitimacy: Ensuring AI systems operate within legal and ethical boundaries.
Accountability: Establishing clear responsibility for AI outcomes.
Well-being: Prioritizing human safety and welfare.
Effectiveness: Ensuring AI solutions are efficient and achieve their goals.
Democracy: Upholding democratic values and public participation.
Distribution: Ensuring the benefits of AI are widely shared.
commonMistakes: Focusing solely on technical effectiveness while ignoring ethical factors like fairness and distribution.
Treating these factors as a checklist rather than interconnected principles that must be balanced.
